personal.name: Muhammad Iqmal Danish bin Hasnan
personal.title: AI & Vision Engineer | Process Engineer
personal.summary: Engineer with 3 years of experience spanning semiconductor manufacturing and Machine Vision/AI. Proficient in Python, C/C++, C#, and frameworks including PyTorch, TensorFlow, OpenCV, and Halcon. Proven track record in deploying defect detection and vision automation systems within production environments. Seeking an Engineer role to leverage industrial domain knowledge and applied AI expertise for scalable, intelligent solutions.

experience.title: Test Back-End Process Engineer
highlights: Consistently achieved >99.6% QFN yield across key packages by proactively managing QFN and LGA quality issues using structured problem-solving methodologies, ensuring high unit quality and process integrity
Led cross-functional coordination on approximately 1.4M units of high-risk metal lid TPMS lots, ensuring full traceability, controlled execution, and zero quality escape
Recognized with Bronze Award for Technical Excellence Award (TEA) Q3'25 and selected to represent TBE at Technical Symposium 2025, while maintaining zero safety incidents across all activities

experience.title: Vision Engineer
highlights: Designed and developed machine vision systems using C# and Python, leveraging HALCON and image processing libraries to meet project and pharmaceutical inspection requirements
Conducted R&D and feasibility studies on vision setups, including image evaluation, hardware-software selection, and solution proposal to ensure robust, compliant inspection performance

Deployed, optimized, and supported PC-based vision inspection systems, covering software architecture, UI optimization, system commissioning at factory/customer sites, and ongoing support in accordance with ISO standards

experience.title: AI Specialist Apprentice
highlights: Deployed YOLOv8 computer vision models for real-time defect classification on electric poles using PyTorch
Curated and annotated datasets using CVAT and Roboflow for supervised learning model training
Implemented predictive modeling techniques and created Power BI dashboards for data visualization
Achieved superior accuracy in defect detection through advanced machine learning algorithms

education.details: Elective in Computer and Control: Machine Vision, Software Engineering, Intelligent Systems

projects.title: Biometric Fingerprint Login System on Vision Scanner
projects.description: Independent multi-modal biometric authentication system (fingerprint + facial recognition) for production vision scanners
highlights: Designed and deployed a multi-modal biometric authentication system (fingerprint + facial recognition) in C++ and C#/.NET using the DigitalPersona SDK and OpenCV, eliminating vendor dependency and achieving ~USD 5,000 cost savings per machine
Implemented automatic login-window detection that locks keyboard input and auto-fills credentials only after a successful biometric match, preventing unauthorized manual entry
Built an embedded SQLite credential store with full access/audit logging for user traceability and audit readiness

projects.title: Portfolio RAG Chatbot with AI Assistant
projects.description: Intelligent chatbot integrated into portfolio website using RAG architecture for contextual Q&A
highlights: Implemented a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system using the GLM-4.7-Flash model for accurate, context-aware responses
Built a full-stack chatbot with Node.js backend, session management, and real-time conversation handling

projects.title: Food Image Classification
projects.description: A Streamlit application that uses a MobileNetV2 model to classify food images into 6 categories with 95% accuracy
highlights: Real-time food image classification with confidence scores and three-page navigation: Model Info, Dataset Analysis, and Prediction
Streamlit application using a fine-tuned MobileNetV2 model to classify food images into 6 categories with 95% accuracy

projects.title: Engineering Room Storage Management System
projects.description: Full-stack inventory management system with barcode-based asset tracking
highlights: Developed a full-stack inventory management system using Microsoft Power Apps and PowerFX with barcode-based asset tracking
Implemented closed-loop borrow/return workflows via Power Automate, including automated alerts for overdue items and low-stock conditions
Integrated SharePoint as the backend repository, reducing manual data entry errors by ~90% and improving asset traceability through role-based access control

projects.title: CNN Deep Learning Portable Dental Caries Detection
projects.description: Award-winning portable dental caries detection system using deep learning
highlights: Awarded Best Overall Final Year Project in the Mechatronics Department for innovation and technical excellence
Developed using CNN deep learning (MobileNetV2), achieving 80% detection accuracy
Engineered an Android application for real-time dental analysis via endoscopic camera, validated in collaboration with dental professionals
